prompt: Create a dark cinematic anime-style scene featuring a young tengu-like girl centered in a medium close-up, wearing a deep red kimono with pale floral embroidery and a dark collar, with pale skin, pointed elf-like ears, black hair tied in a high bun with loose side locks, and small horn-like hair ornaments. Her right hand is raised to her forehead as if shielding or steadying herself, while two large black feathered wings spread behind her. Place a solid opaque square censor block over the center of her face, colored muted gray-brown, hiding her facial features. The background is a surreal teal-blue darkness filled with exactly 6 large glowing yellow eyes embedded in shadowy mask-like forms: one large blurred eye at upper left, one smaller eye left of center, one eye at upper right, one partial eye at far upper right, one large eye at mid-right, and one partial eye at bottom-left. Add exactly 2 drifting black feathers, one on the left side and one on the right side. Use dramatic low-key lighting, soft depth of field, moody blue-green shadows, luminous golden eye highlights, painterly anime rendering, high detail on feathers and kimono fabric, widescreen 16:9 composition, tense supernatural atmosphere, no text, no watermark.
